# SmartPT Documentation

SmartPT documentation covers installation, configuration, operation, and troubleshooting for SmartPT Core, JIT Access, and AD Control in on-premises Active Directory environments.

Primary site: https://docs.smartpt.co.il/
Company site: https://smartpt.co.il/

Key documentation areas:
- SmartPT Core installation, licensing, Console access, product status, product updates, and shared two-factor reset.
- JIT Access product licensing, RBAC, JIT roles, assignments, Eligible OTP activation, active sessions, expiration, and revoke.
- AD Control operator licensing, Tier 1 and Tier 2 actions, password reset, account unlock, profile updates, controlled group membership, and protected identities.
- Shared Active Directory permissions, audit records, security guidance, troubleshooting, and website policies.

This static documentation site does not require login and does not include analytics or advertising tracking scripts.
